message.content:
## 역할 Next.js 15 App Router 프로젝트에서 ForbiddenWord(금지어) 관리 페이지 UI를 구현하는 구현자 에이전트. ## 프로젝트 위치 D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2 ## 현재 상태 - `app/(admin)/forbidden/page.tsx`: `
JSON.stringify
` 플레이스홀더 상태 - `features/forbidden/queries.ts`: getForbiddenWords 구현됨 - `features/forbidden/actions.ts`: 읽어서 확인할 것 - `features/forbidden/schema.ts`: forbiddenSearchSchema, forbiddenSaveSchema 정의됨 ### features/forbidden/schema.ts 내용 ```ts export const forbiddenSearchSchema = z.object({ keyword: z.string().optional(), page: z.coerce.number().default(0), size: z.coerce.number().default(20), }) export const forbiddenSaveSchema = z.object({ wordKor: z.string().min(1).max(100), reason: z.string().max(500).optional(), }) ``` ### Prisma 스키마 (참고) ``` model ForbiddenWord { id Int @id wordKor String reason String? createdAt DateTime updatedAt DateTime } ``` ## 공통 컴포넌트 (이미 존재) - `components/ui/data-table.tsx`: DataTable - `components/ui/search-form.tsx`: SearchForm - `components/ui/page-header.tsx`: PageHeader ## Domain 모듈 패턴 참고 Domain 모듈이 완성된 패턴을 따름. 읽어서 패턴 파악: - `features/domain/actions.ts` — try/catch 패턴 - `features/domain/components/DomainTable.tsx` — DataTable 사용 - `features/domain/components/DomainForm.tsx` — react-hook-form + Dialog - `features/domain/components/DomainDetailPanel.tsx` — 상세 패널 - `app/(admin)/domain/page.tsx` — 페이지 구성 ## 구현할 파일들 ### 1. `features/forbidden/actions.ts` 수정 기존 파일 읽기 후 Prisma 호출에 try/catch 추가 + revalidatePath('/forbidden') 추가. ### 2. `features/forbidden/components/ForbiddenSearchForm.tsx` (신규) - keyword input (placeholder: "금지어 검색") - SearchForm 래핑 - URL 파라미터로 router.push ### 3. `features/forbidden/components/ForbiddenForm.tsx` (신규) - Dialog + react-hook-form + zodResolver(forbiddenSaveSchema) - 필드: wordKor(금지어), reason(사유, textarea, 선택) - createForbiddenWord 또는 updateForbiddenWord 호출 ### 4. `features/forbidden/components/ForbiddenDetailPanel.tsx` (신규) - Dialog로 상세 표시 - 필드: id, wordKor, reason, createdAt, updatedAt - 수정 버튼 → ForbiddenForm(수정 모드) - 삭제 버튼 → deleteForbiddenWord 호출 (try/catch/finally) ### 5. `features/forbidden/components/ForbiddenTable.tsx` (신규) - DataTable 사용 - 컬럼: wordKor(금지어, width:200), reason(사유, flex:1), createdAt(등록일, width:150) - Badge: 금지어에 destructive 배지 표시 (셀 렌더러) - 행 클릭 → ForbiddenDetailPanel - "새 금지어" 버튼 → ForbiddenForm ForbiddenWord 타입: ```ts type ForbiddenItem = { id: number wordKor: string reason: string | null createdAt: Date updatedAt: Date } ``` ### 6. `app/(admin)/forbidden/page.tsx` 교체 ```tsx // Server Component // searchParams await → getForbiddenWords(params) → PageHeader + ForbiddenSearchForm + ForbiddenTable ``` ## 완료 기준 1. 6개 파일 생성/수정 완료 2. npx tsc --noEmit 실행 후 신규 파일 타입 오류 없음 완료 후 파일 목록 보고.

- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init
- review
- security-review

  "name": "frontend",

  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "start": "vite",
    "build": "vite build",
    "preview": "vite preview",
    "lint": "eslint .",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:watch": "vitest"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@hookform/resolvers": "^3.10.0",
    "@radix-ui/react-avatar": "^1.1.11",
    "@radix-ui/react-dialog": "^1.1.15",
    "@radix-ui/react-label": "^2.1.8",
    "@radix-ui/react-scroll-area": "^1.2.10",
    "@radix-ui/react-select": "^2.2.6",
    "@radix-ui/react-separator": "^1.1.8",
    "@radix-ui/react-slot": "^1.2.4",
    "@tanstack/react-query": "^5.76.2",
    "ag-grid-community": "^35.3.0",

content.text:
Build succeeds with no errors. The `AdminForbiddenPage-Vk6FgYPn.js` chunk (5.17 kB) confirms the updated file compiled cleanly.

**What was done:**

File modified: `D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2\frontend\src\features\admin\forbidden\AdminForbiddenPage.jsx`

**Changes:**
- Added `DetailPanel` import from `@/shared/components/DetailPanel/DetailPanel`
- Destructured `selectedId`, `setSelectedId`, `isDetailOpen`, `detailQuery` from `useListPage` (these were already returned by the hook but unused)
- Added `onClick` prop to `ForbiddenCard` — clicking a card calls `setSelectedId(forbidden.id)`
- Cards now show `cursor-pointer hover:border-border transition-colors` for interactivity
- Added `DetailPanel` sidebar that opens when a card is clicked, showing all 8 detail fields from `ForbiddenDtlVo`: `id`, `phwrdNm`, `rcmdtnWordNm`, `enctCycl`, `rvsnSeNm`, `rvsnArtclNm`, `rvsnRsn`, `rmrkCn`, plus `useYn` badge
- Added `DetailRow` helper component for consistent label/value display
- Replaced "편집 기능 준비 중 — 조회 전용" badge with a subtitle paragraph
- Layout changed from `space-y-5` div to `flex gap-0` to accommodate the side panel

**Build:** Clean — `✓ built in 12.84s`, no errors or warnings.
